# Obsidian Configuration Placeholders

This folder contains Git-friendly placeholder configuration for ElliottSecurity KnowledgeOS.

## Open the Vault

Open the `knowledgeos/` directory as the Obsidian vault root (not the Astro repo root).

## Recommended Community Plugins

- Dataview
- Tasks
- Templater
- Git
- Kanban
- Homepage
- Excalidraw
- Metadata Menu
- Calendar
- Style Settings

Install plugins inside Obsidian; manifests here are placeholders for settings continuity.

## Key Settings

| Setting | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Homepage | `00-Home/00 Home` |
| Templates folder | `22-Templates` |
| Daily notes folder | `21-Daily-Notes/Journal` |
| Attachments | `99-Meta/Attachments` |
